title: 🔥偏离拟合价54%，估值进入极值区
body: 市场处于极限价值回归阶段。BTC 价格 $68,735，核心在于偏离拟合价格 $149,598 高达 -54.1%，估值压缩程度刷新纪录。同时价格偏离 200日成本 $91,545 达 -24.9%，长期筹码深度套牢。MVRV 仅 1.27，低于历史 77% 的时间，抛压已至枯竭线。当前属于典型的左侧底部特征，变盘仅需流动性确认。此时你敢逆势布局吗？
title_en: 🔥 Off by 54% from Fit Price, Valuation Hits Extreme Zone
body_en: The market is in the stage of extreme value regression. BTC price at $68,735, with the core issue being a deviation from the fit price of $149,598, a massive -54.1%. The compression of valuation has broken records. At the same time, the price is off by -24.9% from the 200-day cost of $91,545, indicating a deep long-term holding of positions. MVRV stands at just 1.27, lower than 77% of historical times, with bearish pressure reaching exhaustion. Currently, it exhibits typical left-side bottom characteristics, and a reversal only requires confirmation of liquidity. Are you brave enough to position against the trend now?
